name: card
description: A container component with header, content, and footer sections. Includes subtle shadow and hover effects.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes on the root card

slots.name: children
slots.description: Card content — use CardHeader, CardContent, CardFooter subcomponents

Create project Deploy your new project in one-click.

Card content here

ai.whenToUse: Use to group related content with a visual boundary: settings panels, product listings, dashboard widgets, form sections.
ai.whenNotToUse: Don't use for full-page layouts (use plain divs). Don't nest cards inside cards.
commonMistakes: Using Card when a simple div with border would suffice
Forgetting CardContent padding when placing forms inside
ai.accessibilityNotes: Card is a div by default. Add role='region' and aria-label for landmark cards. CardTitle renders h3 — ensure heading hierarchy.
